raw_result.description: All-in-one marketing platform for sales funnels, email marketing, online courses, online selling, and blogging.
raw_result.auth_notes: The gathered evidence indicates a public API link exists on the official site, but no first-party API authentication documentation was actually read in the collected pages/results, so supported auth methods could not be verified.
raw_result.gating_reason: The official pricing page was reviewed and the gathered evidence noted no explicit API gating or developer-access restriction by plan.

api_surface.breadth: A public API link appears to exist on the official website footer, but no official API documentation page content was captured, so the usable API surface could not be verified from the gathered evidence.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official MCP server mention was found in the gathered official pages.

raw_result.blocker: Public API/auth documentation was not actually captured from readable first-party page content in the gathered evidence, so toolkit implementation cannot be supported from verified docs alone.
raw_result.rate_limit_notes: No rate-limit information was found in the gathered official page content.
raw_result.notable_signals: The official site homepage describes broad marketing functionality, the pricing page appears self-serve, and the homepage/footer interaction suggested a 'Public API' link exists, but its documentation content was not captured.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Structured fields auth_methods, api_surface.type, and buildability_verdict cannot be fully supported because the gathered evidence did not include readable first-party API documentation or authentication details.
